summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Siklus Laravel Book Exchange Community application. All pages load correctly, navigation works perfectly, and all features are functional.
passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section, Popular Books grid (5 books), and Recommended Books grid (4 books)
Book Detail page /books/1 shows book info, description/review tabs work, lenders sidebar with functional borrow buttons
Search page /search?q=prince returns 1 correct search result (The Little Prince)
Search page /search?q=xyz shows proper empty state with 'Buku tidak ditemukan' message
Messages page /messages shows 3 conversations, chat area, and functional chat input
Messages page /messages/2 successfully switches to different conversation (Adidharma)
Borrow page /borrow shows tabs, stats, On Read (1), Pending Application (1), Finished Reading (1) sections with data
Lent page /lent shows On Loan (1), Pending Requests (2) with Accept/Reject buttons, Finished Loans (1) sections
Add Book form /borrow/add shows complete form with all required fields (cover, title, author, genre, language, pages, description, condition, location)
Profile page /profile shows user info, stats grid (12 books listed, 48 exchanges, 4.9 rating), curated collection, badges
Profile Edit page /profile/edit shows edit form with pre-filled values and photo upload functionality
Sidebar navigation works - all links navigate correctly to respective pages
Tab navigation between Borrowed Books and Lent Books works perfectly
